meaning: n.格兰诺拉麦片(源出商标名)
examples: I'll bring you some coffee and a bag of granola for breakfast.
Try baking blueberries into oatmeal to create your own oatmeal-blueberry granola bar, or mixing them into the whole wheat pancake or waffle batter.
Quaker Chewy Wholesome low-fat granola bars--PepsiCo calls them a "sensible snack"--aren't really that wholesome.
